final_acceptance_policy: Stage 7 cannot pass until protected GitHub Actions evidence covers real Beta, at least seven M3 Canary days, at least fourteen Blue-Green days, a GA 04:30 run and a real three-role recovery drill. Local implementation preflight proves mechanisms only.

acceptance_contracts.title: Alpha 合成发布前置
acceptance_contracts.environment: local synthetic tests and no-Secret GitHub Actions preflight definition
acceptance_contracts.input: frozen Stage 6 baseline and all production feature flags disabled
acceptance_contracts.oracle: The closed phase policy exercises synthetic release gates while every production flag, network call, Secret read and remote write remains off.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: mechanism tests pass; production flags on 0; external calls 0; protected Alpha workflow runs remain explicitly NOT_RUN until published
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep every production flag disabled and repair the local release policy.

acceptance_contracts.title: Beta 真实 Raw-only Canary
acceptance_contracts.environment: owner-approved protected GitHub Environment with exact Gmail and private repository credentials
acceptance_contracts.input: explicit positive Beta message budget and deterministically verified real candidates
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Only verified candidates are fully fetched; only age ciphertext Raw is committed and remotely recovered; Parser, M3 and Timeline remain off.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: verified real messages 1..configured budget; non-Moomoo full reads 0; M3 0; Processed 0; Timeline mutations 0; recovery 100%
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0702.py plus protected Beta evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Close Raw writes, retain Gmail originals and investigate using aggregate protected evidence.

acceptance_contracts.title: M3 Mutation Budget 1 Canary
acceptance_contracts.environment: protected GitHub Actions after Beta completion
acceptance_contracts.input: remotely recovered verified Raw, a recovered Processed complete or explicit safe-deferred state, and the exact source-message ID
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Processing is enabled before M3; each Trash mutation follows remote recovery, uses only messages.trash for the verified source and is confirmed; the observation spans at least seven days.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: processed or safe-deferred messages >=1; mutation budget max 1; observation >=7 days and >=7 scheduled runs; recovery 100%; collateral mutation 0; Timeline off
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0703.py plus protected seven-day evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Set m3_enabled=false and mutation budget 0; preserve valid Raw and execute the exact recovery plan.

acceptance_contracts.title: Parser 与 Timeline Blue-Green
acceptance_contracts.environment: protected GitHub Actions after M3 Canary completion
acceptance_contracts.input: same recovered encrypted Raw through incumbent and candidate parser/timeline paths
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Candidate and incumbent outputs are compared for at least fourteen days and live Timeline asset cardinality remains exactly one.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: observation >=14 days and >=14 scheduled runs; unresolved comparison differences 0; live Timeline min=max=1
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0704.py plus protected fourteen-day evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Retain incumbent pointers and live Timeline; quarantine candidate outputs without deleting Raw.

acceptance_contracts.title: GA 04:30 全流程
acceptance_contracts.environment: protected single-writer GitHub Actions schedule after every predecessor gate
acceptance_contracts.input: explicit capacity-backed positive mutation budget, current parser and protected phase evidence
acceptance_contracts.oracle: A real schedule run targets 04:30 Australia/Sydney and completes the full verified pipeline with truthful recovery and reconciliation evidence.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: observed scheduled 04:30 runs >=1; collateral/leak/duplicate/reconcile differences 0; recovery 100%; live Timeline exactly 1
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0705.py plus protected GA evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Return to the last protected phase, disable affected flags and retain immutable Raw.

acceptance_contracts.title: 简单被动 Codex Automation
acceptance_contracts.environment: ordinary Codex Automation reading only committed public health evidence
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Healthy state does nothing; abnormal state permits at most one Ops Issue update; the automation has no data-plane or production-trigger capability.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: real/private/Secret reads 0; workflow dispatches 0; issue updates <=1
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0706.py plus owner-created automation evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable the automation; the deterministic data plane continues independently.

acceptance_contracts.title: Recovery Key 真恢复演练
acceptance_contracts.environment: protected GitHub Environment with the real age identity and aggregate-only output
acceptance_contracts.input: random protected Raw, Processed and Timeline ciphertext selections
acceptance_contracts.oracle: One object of each role decrypts and matches its protected digest without printing the identity or persisting plaintext.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: roles recovered 3/3; digest mismatches 0; identity disclosures 0; persistent plaintext objects 0
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0707.py plus protected recovery drill evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Trigger KILL-005, set M3 budget 0 and do not claim recoverability.

acceptance_contracts.title: 运维与补丁生命周期
acceptance_contracts.environment: documented protected operations after GA and recovery completion
acceptance_contracts.input: immutable patch candidate, hash lock, SBOM, security results, rollback commit and canary decision
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Patches, incidents, capacity stops and rollback follow the runbook; High/Critical findings or missing recovery evidence block deployment.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: open High/Critical findings 0; immutable pins/hash lock/SBOM/tests/recovery gates 100%; rollback target exact
acceptance_contracts.verification: python -m pytest -q tests/tasks/test_t0708.py plus protected operations evidence
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Freeze the patch, keep the last verified commit and follow the narrow rollback path.
